nasb.text: For He was foreknown before the foundation of the world, but has appeared in these last times for the sake of you

esv.text: He was foreknown before the foundation of the world but was made manifest in the last times for the sake of you

cnv.text: 基督是在創立世界以前，是　神所預知的，卻在這末後的世代才為你們顯現出來。

ccb.text: 基督是上帝在创世以前预先拣选的，却在这末世为你们显现。

csbs.text: 基督在创世以前就已经被神预先知道，又在这末后的时代为你们的缘故显明出来。
